title: Top racing at Knysna Toyota 7 Passes
description: KNYSNA NEWS - More than 400 cyclists lined...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - More than 400 cyclists lined up for the Knysna Toyota 7 Passes the past weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - More than 400 cyclists lined up for the Knysna Toyota 7 Passes the past weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the open men's race, Ollie Munnik produced a decisive performance, breaking away from his two closest rivals before the Phantom Pass descent and riding solo to victory.","html":"In the open men's race, Ollie Munnik produced a decisive performance, breaking away from his two closest rivals before the Phantom Pass descent and riding solo to victory."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The women's race was won convincingly by Jackie Davidoff, while local rider Anna Hall secured second place after a fierce battle to hold off Ella Corrigan."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The majority of the field took on the gruelling 76km route, which started in Wilderness and tackled a series of mountain passes.","html":"The majority of the field took on the gruelling 76km route, which started in Wilderness and tackled a series of mountain passes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As an official event on the South African cycling calendar, racing was conducted under formal regulations, with the men and women starting ten minutes apart, followed later by the e-bike category.","html":"As an official event on the South African cycling calendar, racing was conducted under formal regulations, with the men and women starting ten minutes apart, followed later by the e-bike category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 38km race began in Karatara and delivered exciting racing - particularly among the younger riders - all the way to the finish at The Farm venue at the foot of the Simola Pass.","html":"The 38km race began in Karatara and delivered exciting racing - particularly among the younger riders - all the way to the finish at The Farm venue at the foot of the Simola Pass."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The development Kano Team from Plettenberg Bay stood out, dominating several of the junior and youth categories.","html":"The development Kano Team from Plettenberg Bay stood out, dominating several of the junior and youth categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Off the bike, the event maintained a relaxed and social atmosphere. All entrants enjoyed a post-race lunch and a beer included in their entry, rounding off the day on a festive note.","html":"Off the bike, the event maintained a relaxed and social atmosphere. All entrants enjoyed a post-race lunch and a beer included in their entry, rounding off the day on a festive note."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Top racing at Knysna Toyota 7 Passes
